subject: A goggled driver recoils in their wrecked race vehicle as a massive cyan-blue arcane blast erupts from the wheel, blowing debris and metal shards across a banked racetrack
description: A racing vehicle has suffered a catastrophic blowout on a banked, curved track. The right side of the frame is dominated by the wrecked machine — pink and bronze-plated bodywork, a spoked wheel, and a startled driver with white hair, large round goggles, and pointed elf-like ears, mouth open in alarm. From the wheel/axle erupts a huge swirling sphere of cyan and white arcane energy, hurling jagged black debris and shards of metal outward in radial streaks. The blast crackles with lightning-like filaments. In the upper left, a distant grandstand pavilion with a fluted pink roof sits under a hazy lavender-and-peach sky. The motion is frozen mid-disaster — the driver hasn't crashed yet, but the wheel has detonated.
foreground: wrecked racing vehicle, goggled driver, exploding wheel, scattered debris and shrapnel
background: banked racetrack, distant grandstand pavilion, hazy sky
emotion: alarmed, mouth open, recoiling — driver caught mid-disaster
